overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking along a 19th-century wooden harbor dock. The character passes by the Eastern Riverboat Company building, industrial cargo areas with workers, and a large metal crane at the waterfront before turning back.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dock promenade with riverboat company

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock past commercial buildings and benches

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with white signage reading EASTERN RIVERBOAT COMPANY
wooden park bench with metal armrests facing the dock
American flag waving on a tall pole near the dock buildings
ornate black cast iron street lamp along the dock walkway
long wooden warehouse building with corrugated metal roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the main wooden dock promenade, passing the Eastern Riverboat Company building on the right and wooden benches on the left. The area is relatively open with sparse pedestrian activity and American flags visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cargo storage area with stacked goods

events.description: enters industrial cargo area with stacked crates and working dockhands

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowded industrial dock area with workers carrying goods and pushing carts

notable_agents.action: dock worker carrying a large sack on his shoulder toward the camera
worker pushing a wooden cart loaded with cargo

entered.detail: industrial shed with corrugated metal walls and roof
stacks of wooden shipping crates and boxes piled along the dock
large burlap sacks stacked on pallets
industrial smokestacks emitting smoke visible above the rooftops

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busier industrial zone filled with stacked wooden crates, burlap sacks, and barrels. Dock workers move through the area carrying cargo, and the camera passes under a covered walkway between wooden warehouses.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow waterfront dock with cargo crane

events.description: turns onto narrow waterfront dock with view of river and moored boats

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dock edge toward a large metal crane, passing workers carrying lumber

notable_agents.action: worker carrying wooden planks on his shoulder toward the crane

entered.detail: small dark wooden building with ROPE & CORD painted on the roof
large black metal steam crane with boom arm for loading cargo
calm river water with wooden dock pilings visible
tall-masted sailing ships docked in the river
wooden posts along the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a narrower dock section with the river visible on the right. A large industrial metal crane dominates the foreground, while the Rope & Cord building sits on the left. Moored sailboats are visible in the water beyond the dock.

events.description: character stops at the crane, looks around, then turns to walk back toward the main dock

agents.ego_description: pauses to observe the crane and river view, then walks back past workers carrying cargo

notable_agents.action: worker carrying a large wrapped bundle on his shoulder walking toward the camera

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the end of the dock near the large crane, observing the river view, then turns and walks back toward the main dock area. The Rope & Cord building now appears on the right as the character retraces their steps past more dock workers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a 19th-century harbor that transitions from an open promenade into a dense industrial waterfront before retracing its steps. It begins by following a character past the Eastern Riverboat Company building and wooden benches under a wide sky with distant American flags. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a bustling cargo zone filled with stacked crates, burlap sacks, and workers moving beneath a covered warehouse walkway. The camera then pushes forward onto a tighter dock section where a massive metal crane dominates the view beside the Rope & Cord building and moored sailboats. Finally, after a brief pause to observe the river, the character turns around and walks back toward the main dock, passing the workers and the Rope & Cord building once more.
